top_patterns.description: Blake shares a personal insight or lesson, often ending with an invitation or encouragement.
top_patterns.structure_template: Personal insight/lesson + #hashtags + optional call to action
example_quotes: Send this to someone who might not feel enough. - Blake Mycoskie
Fail fast. Wasting time pretending everything is perfect… that scares me.

top_patterns.description: Narrative about an experience or person, ending with a lesson or insight.
top_patterns.when_it_appears: Common in captions about personal growth or entrepreneurship
example_quotes: I remember this day like it was yesterday. It was a beautiful, fun, hilarious moment that was a lesson to me...
Working 80 to 90 hours a week left me burned out, now I prioritize mental health.

top_patterns.description: Poses a question or thought, prompting reflection or connection.
top_patterns.when_it_appears: Occasional, often in motivational or mental health contexts
example_quotes: What made TOMS spread wasn’t marketing. It was the story.
Sometimes the breakthrough isn’t changing the product, it’s changing who you’re pitching it to.

archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Inspire, motivate, or share a core belief
example_quotes: Titles matter less than results. Let people use whatever title helps them get the job done.
Living out of alignment with yourself eventually catches up to you.
This week a new team member asked me what their title should be...
I met Muhammad Yunus, and that conversation reshaped how I see business.

archetypal_structures.formula: Pose a question or thought + optional hashtags
example_quotes: Are you living for what feels true to you?
What’s the real engine behind your purpose?

bridge_phrases: When we learn to sit with ourselves
When you start living for what feels true
language_habits.sentence_length_profile: Mostly short, punchy sentences, often 10-20 words
language_habits.line_break_style: Mostly continuous text with occasional line breaks for emphasis

example_quotes: Depression isn’t a personal failure. It’s a check-engine light.
Living out of alignment with yourself eventually catches up to you.

voice_tells.why_it_matters: Creates emotional connection and imparts wisdom
example_quotes: I remember this day like it was yesterday.
Working 80 to 90 hours a week left me burned out.
Fail fast. Wasting time pretending everything is perfect… that scares me.

anti_patterns: Lack of personal voice or authenticity

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Blake’s current voice emphasizes authenticity, personal growth, and storytelling, with a focus on mental health and purpose.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: Shift toward more personal reflection and less promotional language.
